mapper.select:
SELECT S.SESSION_ID AS sessionId, S.USER_ID AS userId, U.NAME AS userName, S.HOST AS host, S.SSH_USER AS sshUser, S.REMOTE_ADDR AS remoteAddr, S.CONNECTED_AT AS connectedAt, S.DISCONNECTED_AT AS disconnectedAt FROM r_user_ssh_sessions S LEFT JOIN R_USER_T U ON S.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE 1=1
AND S.USER_ID = #{filterUserId}
AND (U.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR S.HOST LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR S.SSH_USER LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR S.REMOTE_ADDR LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
ORDER BY U.NAME
ORDER BY S.HOST
ORDER BY S.SSH_USER
ORDER BY S.CONNECTED_AT
ORDER BY S.SESSION_ID
ASC
DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT S.SESSION_ID AS sessionId, S.USER_ID AS userId, U.NAME AS userName, S.HOST AS host, S.SSH_USER AS sshUser, S.REMOTE_ADDR AS remoteAddr, S.CONNECTED_AT AS connectedAt, S.DISCONNECTED_AT AS disconnectedAt FROM r_user_ssh_sessions S LEFT JOIN R_USER_T U ON S.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE S.HOST LIKE CONCAT(#{host}, '%') ORDER BY S.CONNECTED_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM r_user_ssh_sessions WHERE HOST LIKE CONCAT(#{host}, '%')
